title: Quickclay
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Quickclay.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], trapped in quickclay]]
{{Quote|Master Luke, either the Princess is shrinking or the planet itself has decided to ''eat'' her!|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1">[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Quickclay''' was a type of sticky, green-gray soil prevalent on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] (formally called Circarpous V). It was a hazard because it gave way easily under pressure, which could result in an object or individual being sucked in and becoming trapped in it, much like [[Quicksand/Legends|quicksand]]. It was harder than mud or sand, and more like clay.

Quickclay, imported to her [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Gardulla the Hutt's Palace/Legends|palace]] from the planet Circarpous V, was placed among the exotic (and mostly predatory) flora and fauna of [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt's]] [[Gardulla's pleasure garden|pleasure garden]]. Young [[Anakin Skywalker]], fleeing from sinister trackers in the garden, stumbled into a quickclay patch, sinking his arm up to his elbow in the greenish goo but managing at last to extract himself from it. It went a bit worse for the bumbling [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] cyclops giant [[Gondry]], however, whose huge gangling body sunk to its armpits before Anakin threw it a tree branch and helped free the witless monster from its would-be grave.<ref name="Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne">''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''</ref>

After crash-landing on Circarpous V, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] became trapped in a patch of quickclay, but she was rescued from it shortly thereafter by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].
